name: PER_COMPARISON_SETS_VL
query: SELECT B.COMPARISON_SET_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.COMPARISON_SET_CODE, B.USER_ID, B.WORKER_FLAG, B.LINE_MANAGER_FLAG, T.COMPARISON_SET_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.MODULE_ID FROM PER_COMPARISON_SETS_B B, PER_COMPARISON_SETS_TL T WHERE B.COMPARISON_SET_ID = T.COMPARISON_SET_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
